I looked it up and the Red Cross has a full-day course running the second weekend of the month if you haven't signed up anywhere yet. Don't let it sneak up on you!
snippet: Darren, I just wanted to send a little reminder that your first aid and CPR rece...
subject: Training reminder

body: Mom, I'm already registered — I signed up for the June 28th session at the community center a few weeks ago. Brett actually reminded all of us instructors about it back in May so we got on it pretty early this year. But thank you for keeping an eye out, I appreciate it!
snippet: Mom, I'm already registered — I signed up for the June 28th session at the commu...
subject: Re: Training reminder

body: Oh good, I'm so relieved! I just worry with everything you have going on. June 28th is coming up fast though — do you have all the documentation you need? I remember last time you had to bring your previous card and some form they sent in advance.
snippet: Oh good, I'm so relieved! I just worry with everything you have going on. June 2...
subject: Re: Training reminder

body: Yes, I've got it all sorted. I have my old certification card and the pre-course packet the instructor emailed out. It's a full-day thing so I'll be out until around 5, but I'll text you when I'm done so you know how it went.
snippet: Yes, I've got it all sorted. I have my old certification card and the pre-course...
subject: Re: Training reminder

body: Perfect, please do text me! And if you want, I can make dinner that evening so you don't have to cook after a long day. Just say the word and I'll have something ready for you and the kids. It's the least I can do.
snippet: Perfect, please do text me! And if you want, I can make dinner that evening so y...
subject: Re: Training reminder

body: Hey man, you free for lunch any day this week? I've been meaning to try that new ramen spot on Clement Street and figured we could finally just go. I think they open at 11:30. Wednesday or Thursday work better for you?
snippet: Hey man, you free for lunch any day this week? I've been meaning to try that new...
subject: Lunch this week?

body: Thursday works for me — I've got a morning lesson that should wrap by 11 so I can meet you by 11:45. That way we beat the lunch crowd. I've heard good things about that place, I'm definitely down. See you there.
snippet: Thursday works for me — I've got a morning lesson that should wrap by 11 so I ca...
subject: Re: Lunch this week?

body: Yo, I just realized we haven't actually had a real conversation in like two weeks even though we live together, which is kind of embarrassing honestly. You want to grab coffee next Tuesday morning? I don't have anything until noon so I'm free. Would be nice to actually sit down and catch up.
snippet: Yo, I just realized we haven't actually had a real conversation in like two week...
subject: Coffee next Tuesday?

body: Ha, you're not wrong — we've been totally ships in the night lately. Tuesday morning works for me. Is that place on Irving still your go-to or do you want to try somewhere different? I'll need to be back by 10:30 to get ready for my afternoon shift but that gives us plenty of time.
snippet: Ha, you're not wrong — we've been totally ships in the night lately. Tuesday mor...
subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?

body: Irving is perfect, their cortados are still the best in the neighborhood. Let's say 9am — that's a solid hour and a half. Looking forward to it. Also I need to tell you about what happened at work last Friday, it's a whole thing and I've been waiting to tell you in person.
snippet: Irving is perfect, their cortados are still the best in the neighborhood. Let's ...
subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?

body: Okay so your birthday is next Saturday and I am not letting you do nothing again like last year. I'm thinking we get a small group together for brunch — like 6 to 8 people, somewhere with bottomless mimosas. I was thinking that place in the Mission you liked the last time we went. What do you say?
snippet: Okay so your birthday is next Saturday and I am not letting you do nothing again...
subject: Birthday brunch plans

body: I was honestly fine with doing nothing but since you're insisting, brunch sounds great. I do love that Mission spot. Last time the wait was brutal though — should we make a reservation? Also who are you thinking of inviting? Keep it small like you said, no more than 8 please.
snippet: I was honestly fine with doing nothing but since you're insisting, brunch sounds...
subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans

body: Already looked into it — they take reservations for groups of 6 or more now, so we're set. I'm thinking you, me, Marcus, Priya, and Jamie and Devon from your old crew. That's exactly six which feels right. I'll book it for 11am. Oh and I'm handling the cake, don't even bother arguing about it.
snippet: Already looked into it — they take reservations for groups of 6 or more now, so ...
subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans

body: That lineup is actually perfect. And no arguments here on the cake — do whatever you want, I trust you. Seriously though, thanks for putting this together Cole. You didn't have to but I really do appreciate it. Let me know if there's anything I can help with.
snippet: That lineup is actually perfect. And no arguments here on the cake — do whatever...
subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
